name: Claude Code Hooks Collection
description: A growing collection of ready-to-use Claude Code hooks covering safety, automation, and notifications. Includes hooks like block-dangerous-commands and protect-secrets. Copy, paste, and customize.

name: Claude Hooks (TypeScript)
description: Write Claude Code hooks with full TypeScript type safety and auto-completion. No more guessing payload structures or dealing with untyped data — strongly-typed hook payloads out of the box.

name: Claude Code Hooks Mastery
description: Master all Claude Code hook events with this comprehensive repo. Features an intelligent TTS system, security enhancements, and automatic logging. Uses UV single-file Python scripts for clean separation.

name: Claude Hooks (Clean Code)
description: A lightweight Python-based hook system that enforces clean code practices and automates workflows. Provides automatic validation, quality checks, and notifications during Claude Code sessions.

name: Rule2Hook
description: Transform natural language project rules into Claude Code hooks effortlessly. Define your conventions in plain English and get working hooks generated automatically.

name: Claude Code Sound Alerts
description: Sound notification hooks for Claude Code that play audio alerts on macOS, Windows, and Linux when Claude finishes a task or needs your attention.

name: Multi-Agent Observability
description: Real-time monitoring for Claude Code agents through hook event tracking. Captures, stores, and visualizes hook events across multiple concurrent agents with session tracking and live updates.

name: Claude Tools & Hooks
description: User-defined shell commands that execute automatically at various points in Claude Code's lifecycle. Hooks can modify, approve, or block tool executions, add context, and automate workflows deterministically.

name: Claude Code Showcase
description: A comprehensive Claude Code configuration example with hooks that auto-format code, run tests on file changes, type-check TypeScript, and block edits on protected branches.

name: Awesome Claude Code
description: A curated list of skills, hooks, slash-commands, agent orchestrators, applications, and plugins for Claude Code. The go-to directory for discovering the Claude Code ecosystem.

name: Claude Code Infrastructure Showcase
description: Production-tested Claude Code infrastructure patterns from 6 months of real-world use on a TypeScript microservices project. Covers skill auto-activation, hooks, and multi-agent setups.

name: Awesome Claude Code Hooks
description: A community-driven collection of Claude Code hooks. Open to contributions — submit your own hooks via issues or PRs and benefit from hooks shared by other developers.

name: Claude Code Data Science Team
description: A multi-agent system built on Claude Code that simulates real data science team collaboration. Agents with different specializations work together to deliver end-to-end solutions from raw data to final analysis reports.

name: Data Analyst Augmentation Framework (DAAF)
description: An open-source extensible workflow for Claude Code that accelerates data analysis by 5-10x while maintaining transparency, rigor, and reproducibility. Built for researchers and data analysts who need to scale their expertise.

name: Astronomer AI Agents
description: AI agent tooling for data engineering workflows built by the Astronomer team. Integrates with Airflow deployments via an MCP server and handles data warehouse queries through background Jupyter kernels.
